title: Lacquered Crispy Australian Kangaroo Fritters
description: Umami-packed, crispy kangaroo fritters glazed with a lacquer finish, perfect for a hangover cure and sugar-free friendly.
instructions: In a bowl, combine the kangaroo mince, grated parmesan, low-carb breadcrumbs, egg, salt, pepper, and garlic powder; mix until well blended.
Shape the mixture into small fritter patties about 2cm thick.
Heat the cooking oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until shimmering.
Place the fritters in the skillet and cook for 3 minutes on each side until golden brown and cooked through.
While the fritters cook, whisk together soy sauce, lemon juice, powdered erythritol, and rice vinegar in a small bowl to make the lacquer glaze.
When the fritters are almost done, brush the glaze over their tops and let it caramelize for 30 seconds on each side.
Transfer the glazed fritters to a plate lined with paper towels to soak up excess oil.
Serve the lacquered crispy Australian kangaroo fritters immediately, optionally garnished with fresh herbs.
Pair with a glass of sparkling water or a low-sugar iced tea for a hangover-friendly meal.
